approvedBy: Steve full steam ahead instruction + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as a bounded no-auth Foundation DB monolith split. Scope: extract only shared-comms coverage snapshot aggregation from lib/foundation-db.js into lib/foundation-shared-comms-coverage.js, preserve SQL intent, output shape, public export, existing callers, and read-only behavior. Not approved: broad DB rewrite, schema changes, shared-comms extraction/candidate/synthesis behavior, Strategy UI changes, Meeting Vault ACL Phase B, Drive permission mutation, live Missive/Gmail/Slack APIs, Sales/Marketing/Ops hub work, Canva client work, paid-source auth, source crawl/job/intelligence/action-router/agent-feedback movement, or request-access emails.
